tasks.name: Vector Buffer
equivalence_notes: Uniform projected CRS and planar buffer
ArcGIS Buffer method vs Shapely GEOS implementation may differ in vertex detail

tasks.name: Overlay Intersect
tasks.description: Topological intersection of two polygon layers
equivalence_notes: GeoPandas overlay is geometry-type sensitive and may invoke make_valid
ArcGIS may repair geometries internally; repair overhead recorded as separate metric

tasks.name: Spatial Join
equivalence_notes: Predicate fixed to 'intersects' or 'within' per run
JOIN_ONE_TO_ONE semantics matched by deduplicating sjoin results

tasks.name: Raster Resample
tasks.description: Resample raster to different cell size
equivalence_notes: Output alignment checked by pixel dimensions, not pixel-perfect equality

tasks.name: Raster Clip/Mask
equivalence_notes: Centered window clip with exact dimension contract
Rasterio mask semantics aligned via window extraction

tasks.name: Polygon to Raster
equivalence_notes: CELL_CENTER assignment in ArcGIS; Rasterio rasterize without all_touched

simple.name: Simple
simple.description: Regular grid/rectangles with low vertex count

medium.name: Medium
medium.description: OSM-like roads/landuse with moderate vertex count

complex.name: Complex
complex.description: Building footprints/coastline-like with high vertex count

parallel_modes.name: External Multiprocess
parallel_modes.description: Chunked multiprocess implemented consistently across all stacks

parallel_modes.name: ArcPy Parallel Processing Factor
parallel_modes.description: Only honored by specific ArcGIS Pro tools
